title: REBX: Multi-Channel Refurbished Commerce
summary: Owned multi-channel refurbished commerce across Shopify, eBay, Back Market, and Temu. Built the eBay returns ops bridge — API sync, OCR intake, unified dashboard — connecting warehouse processing and customer service.
cardSummary: Multi-channel refurbished commerce across Shopify, eBay, Back Market, and Temu — plus eBay returns ops infrastructure.
challenge: Refurbished tech requires trust at every touchpoint. At eBay volume, returns also broke operationally — processing, customer service, and Seller Hub lived in separate tools with no shared context. RebX needed one commerce operating model and one returns resolution layer across channels.
challengeParagraphs: Refurbished tech requires trust at every touchpoint — consistent grading, warranty, and condition signals across every channel where RebX sells.

At eBay volume, returns broke operationally. Processing, customer service, and Seller Hub lived in separate tools with no shared context. RebX needed one commerce operating model and one returns resolution layer.
strategy: Ran a four-tier sales architecture — DTC anchor, volume marketplaces, refurb-native, and discovery — with channel-specific trust and pricing rules. Internal systems work focused on the highest-friction bottleneck: eBay returns at scale.
implementation: Built RebX Certified Refurbished standard — 90-point quality check, four cosmetic grades, 12-month warranty — applied across all channels
Deployed trade-in valuation flow as the inventory flywheel feeding Shopify, eBay, Back Market, and Temu catalogues
Championed internal returns platform for high-volume eBay (detailed in Systems & operations)
Established channel-tier pricing and listing rules to protect margin on discovery channels while maximising reach on eBay and Back Market
Unified PDP trust architecture: grading guides, warranty terms, and condition labels adapted per platform

operationsPrograms.title: eBay returns ops bridge
operationsPrograms.problem: With 190K+ items sold, eBay returns scaled faster than the manual workflow. Warehouse processing scanned and graded devices in one system; customer service worked cases in Seller Hub with no linked intake evidence. Disputes stalled on back-and-forth between teams.
operationsPrograms.approach: Designed and championed a custom returns programme: eBay API feeds return cases into a central dashboard; OCR scanning at processing captures label, serial, and condition data on intake; CS and warehouse share one case view to close returns and buyer issues faster.
highlights: Integrated eBay Post-Order API — return requests, reasons, tracking, and case status sync into a single dashboard
OCR scanning at warehouse intake auto-captures return labels, serials/IMEI, and device identifiers against the open case
Unified case view links API return data with physical scan evidence — processing status visible to CS in real time
Customer service resolves buyer queries and partial-refund decisions without leaving the dashboard or re-asking warehouse
Processing team flags grading discrepancies and damage with scanned proof attached to the same eBay return ID
Homepage hero with trust bar — free delivery, 12-month warranty, 30-day returns
Interactive 3D grading guide and trade-in programme
Klarna, Clearpay, and Shop Pay on higher-ticket refurbished devices
